item.title: Waltz and Jam animated gameplay trailer
item.content:encoded:
• PC

A lost, innocent ghost and his loyal spirit puppy.

Flyway Games has released a new animated gameplay trailer for top-down puzzle action adventure game Waltz and Jam, which was first announced in February 2024.

Here is an overview of the game, via Flyway Games:

About

Blending lush hand-drawn animation with previously unreleased gameplay footage, the newly published trailer showcases the game’s striking comic-inspired visual style, whimsical atmosphere, and the emotional bond between its two heroes: Waltz, a lost and innocent ghost, and Jam, his loyal spirit puppy.

Set in Downtown, a mysterious and magical afterlife inspired by the Seven Deadly Sins, Waltz and Jam invites you into a beautifully crafted world filled with wonder, danger, and secrets waiting to be uncovered. Across seven distinct realms, you’ll solve creative environmental puzzles, battle mighty foes, collect mysterious tools, and face towering bosses as you journey toward the Gate of Judgement.

At the heart of this magical adventure is the unbreakable partnership between Waltz and Jam. While Waltz uses clever gadgets and collectible toys they find, Jam unlocks powerful transformative abilities that reveal hidden paths, solve puzzles, and can even turn the tide in combat. More than just an adventure, Waltz and Jam is a heartfelt journey through life, loss, and destiny, wrapped in a world that feels equal parts eerie, magical, and unforgettable.

Key Features

  • Puzzle-focused exploration across interconnected realms packed with secrets.
  • Dynamic companion gameplay combining Waltz’s tools with Jam’s abilities.
  • Thrilling boss encounters requiring strategy, timing, and teamwork.
  • A richly stylized hand-drawn world bursting with spooky charm and playful humor.

Waltz and Jam will be available for PC via Steam. A release date has yet to be announced.

Watch the trailer below.

Animated Gameplay Trailer
